description: A robotics engineer is designing a drive shaft for a robot arm actuator. Create a 12 mm diameter, 80 mm long cylindrical shaft with a 4 mm wide, 2.5 mm deep, and 30 mm long rectangular keyway slot. The keyway must run parallel to the shaft axis, start flush from one end, and be centered across the top of the shaft cross-section. Save the model to ~/Documents/FreeCAD/drive_shaft_keyway.FCStd
